summary: Completed end-to-end testing of appointment system with video meeting functionality. All features working correctly: Jitsi video links generated on appointment creation, VideoMeetingButton shows countdown/Join Meeting/Join Now based on time, buttons open Jitsi links in new tab.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test appointments with video links for testing VideoMeetingButton component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video meeting functionality fully tested. VideoMeetingButton component shows: 1) Countdown timer if >10 mins away, 2) 'Join Meeting' button if within 10 mins before to 30 mins after, 3) 'Join Now' with pulse animation if session is live. Jitsi links are generated automatically on appointment creation via video_service.py.

backend_api_tests.video_providers_endpoint: PASS - Returns Jitsi as default provider
backend_api_tests.get_appointment_includes_video_link: PASS - videoLink and videoProvider fields present
backend_api_tests.provider_today_appointments: PASS - Provider can fetch today's appointments
backend_api_tests.client_appointments_list: PASS - Client can fetch pending appointments
backend_api_tests.client_confirmed_appointments: PASS - Client can fetch confirmed appointments
backend_api_tests.different_appointments_get_different_lin: PASS - Each appointment gets unique video link

frontend_ui_tests.join_button_opens_jitsi: PASS - Opens https://meet.jit.si/docportal-xxx in new tab
frontend_ui_tests.todays_schedule_section: PASS - Shows today's appointments with video buttons

feature_verification.appointment_creation_generates_jitsi_lin: VERIFIED - video_service.py generates unique Jitsi links
feature_verification.video_meeting_button_countdown: VERIFIED - Shows countdown when >10 mins away
feature_verification.video_meeting_button_active_10_mins_befo: VERIFIED - 'Join Meeting' button appears 10 mins before
feature_verification.video_meeting_button_live_session: VERIFIED - 'Join Now' with pulse animation when session is live
feature_verification.join_button_opens_new_tab: VERIFIED - Opens Jitsi link in new tab
feature_verification.provider_dashboard_video_buttons: VERIFIED - Today's Schedule shows video join buttons
feature_verification.client_portal_video_buttons: VERIFIED - Upcoming Appointments shows video join buttons
feature_verification.client_appointments_page_video_buttons: VERIFIED - My Appointments page shows video join buttons

video_provider: Jitsi Meet (free, no API key required)
